visual.name: procalendarHeatmap
visual.description: Calendar heatmap analytics for Power BI with annual, month, multi-year, fiscal quarter, and week-hour heatmaps.

en-US.visual.name: ProCalendar Heatmap
en-US.visual.description: Calendar heatmap analytics for Power BI with annual, month, multi-year, fiscal quarter, and week-hour heatmaps.
en-US.Watermark_Free: ProCalendar Heatmap Free - Upgrade to Pro
en-US.EmptyState_Welcome_Body: Drag a Date column and a numeric Value column into the visual to begin.
en-US.EmptyState_AddDate_Body: ProCalendar Heatmap needs a date column to render.
en-US.EmptyState_AddValue_Body: ProCalendar Heatmap needs a numeric value column to color cells.
en-US.EmptyState_WeekHourNeedsDateTime_Body: Week x Hour Heatmap requires the Date role to contain real time-of-day values. Date-only fields can be shifted by timezone conversion and are ignored in this mode.
en-US.EmptyState_AnnualNoOverlap_Title: Selected year is outside the date range
en-US.EmptyState_AnnualNoOverlap_Body: Choose a different Annual Focus year or expand the Date Range settings.
en-US.EmptyState_NoData_Body: All required fields are bound but no rows produced valid dates.

dataRoles.name: dateField
dataRoles.description: The date column. Date or DateTime values are accepted.

dataRoles.name: valueField
dataRoles.description: Primary numeric value driving cell color intensity.

dataRoles.name: secondaryValue
dataRoles.description: Optional second metric shown in tooltip and future multi-metric modes.

dataRoles.name: tertiaryValue
dataRoles.description: Optional third metric shown in tooltip and future multi-metric modes.

dataRoles.name: holidayField
dataRoles.description: Optional holiday indicator for future holiday rendering.

dataRoles.name: tooltipFields
dataRoles.description: Additional fields shown in the hover tooltip.
